title: Behavioral Eval Case
description: Spec for a single behavioral eval: one user prompt, expected events, deterministic scoring only (WO-N2).

eval_id.description: Stable identifier; primary key in ds_eval_baselines.

version.description: Semver. Bump when expected_events changes meaningfully.

description.description: One sentence: what rail behavior is being measured.

skill_id.description: Optional: ds eval run --skill filters to this skill's evals.

input_prompt.description: The user prompt that was injected into the session.

fixture_events.description: Pre-seeded event list for deterministic unit/regression tests. Null means caller supplies recorded events from canonical substrate.

expected_events.description: Events that must (or must not) appear. This is the sole scoring source.

max_sequence_position.description: If set, event must appear at or before this 0-based position.

payload_contains.description: If set, the event payload must contain these key/value pairs.

notes.description: Optional human-readable description of expected behavior. Not used for scoring.

event_weight.description: Always 1.0 — scoring is 100% deterministic event matching.

minimum_score.description: Event score threshold; below this the eval counts as failed.
